content: The entire Meta module (src/lib/meta/) ships DORMANT and fails safe OFF: isMetaEnabled() reads flags.meta_integration and coalesces a missing row, a disabled row, OR any read error to false; createMetaClient()/getMetaConfig() THROW when META_APP_ID/META_APP_SECRET are absent so no Graph call is ever attempted without creds. Callers hitting Graph must gate on BOTH isMetaConfigured() (env) AND await isMetaEnabled() (flag). App Review takes weeks (spec §11 R-6), so nothing lights up implicitly.

name: injectable-graph-client
description: Graph client makes base URL/version/fetch injectable so tests never hit the network; MetaApiError classifies auth/rate-limit errors for the CAPI worker
